---
title: "Magenta Book"
description: "Book overview and study-note index for Magenta Book."
book_id: "magenta-book"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-executive-summary:c0003"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-3-evaluation-methods:c0002"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-5-managing-an-evaluation:c0017"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Magenta Book

Study notes on *Magenta Book: Central Government guidance on evaluation* [@hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book]. These notes are generated from source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>3 major-section notes</span>
  <span>2020</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
  <span>MCP evaluation-texts</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across these notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, page ranges, and reading routes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the notes.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2020</span><span>MCP evaluation-texts</span><span>Status: needs_review</span><span>Book overview</span></div>

This index summarises generated study notes for HM Treasury and Evaluation Task Force's *Magenta Book: Central Government guidance on evaluation* [@hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book]. The generated pages use selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Government evaluation should be scoped around decision needs, appropriate methods, robust data, quality assurance, and clear use of findings.

## Major-Section Notes

- [Executive Summary and Evaluation Types](section-01-executive-summary.qmd) - source pages 3
- [Choosing Evaluation Methods](section-02-evaluation-methods.qmd) - source pages 6
- [Managing an Evaluation](section-03-managing-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 8

## References
